title: 65-lesson checkpoint: sustained speed
description: Mid-Block 5 speed checkpoint — full paragraph, no breaks
text: Two-thirds through the course now. Your fingers know the keyboard better than you think. Trust them. Read ahead by a word or two, breathe steadily, and let the text flow from your hands without thinking about which finger goes where.

tips.text: Track your peak WPM — is it climbing? You're on the right curve

tips.text: If you stall here, drop accuracy to 90% and push speed up

character_tips.anna: Two-thirds checkpoint. Your fingers know more than your conscious mind.
character_tips.maxim: 65 lessons in. Track your number — it should be above 60 by now.
character_tips.knopych: CHECKPOINT! 🚩 You're closer to victory than start!
character_tips.klavochka: Almost there, my star ⭐ Keep that beautiful rhythm!
